targets.content: Timor-Leste’s NDC is an economy-wide commitment to establishing a ‘nature-positive’ resilient development pathway.

measures.instrument: Vehicle restrictions (import, age, access, sale, taxation)
measures.quote:
to promote and implement the current Decree Law on used vehicles which are imported into Timro-Leste to be less than 5 years of factory production
public transport:

promote use of public transport by enabling convenient (routes to all areas) and reliable access to bus or micro-bus, constructing appropriate facilities such as proper bus stops, terminals, and establish necessary regulations to control the transportation system

measures.instrument: Vehicle restrictions (import, age, access, sale, taxation)
measures.quote: Vehicle Standards - Decree-Law (No. 30/2011) prohibits the import of light passenger and mixed vehicles that are more than 5 years old (from the date of their original manufacture to the date of import) with exceptions in place for particular circumstances and vehicles. Timor-Leste will continue to use these standards to control vehicle imports and revise them as required to suit national policies and priorities.

measures.instrument: General transport and land use planning
measures.quote: Transport System Master Plan - A transport master plan will be developed to build sector resilience and reduce emissions derived from the transport sector. This plan will create policy entry points for promoting and supporting climate-friendly public transport options and non-motorised transport solutions where possible.

adaptation.quote: Improve physical infrastructure/civil engineering and natural vegetation methods to prevent landslides in hill sites, roads and river banks

Transport System Master Plan - A transport master plan will be developed to build sector resilience and reduce emissions derived from the transport sector. This plan will create policy entry points for promoting and supporting climate-friendly public transport options and non-motorised transport solutions where possible.
